facebook.caption: Tucked along 58 Hoàng Văn Thụ, 58 CAFÉ is the kind of spot that earns its 4.6-star rating quietly, one good cup at a time. With over 120 reviews singing its praises, this little café has clearly become a trusted pit stop for both locals and visitors exploring Phu Quoc. Whether you need a morning coffee before hitting the beaches or a cool afternoon retreat, it delivers a relaxed, unpretentious vibe that feels genuinely welcoming. Practical tip: the address sits in a residential pocket of the island, so plug it into Google Maps before you head out.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the cups come out, the steam rise, and the whole slow-down feeling of 58 CAFÉ do its thing. This is what a proper coffee break in Phu Quoc looks like, no fuss, just good vibes and a great rating to back it up. If your itinerary needs a breather, this is the place.

instagram.caption: A 4.6-star café hiding on a quiet Phu Quoc street. 58 CAFÉ at 58 Hoàng Văn Thụ is your sign to slow down, order something cold or hot, and let the island pace take over. Save this one for your trip.
instagram.video_caption: Steam, sips, and a street corner in Phu Quoc that actually makes you want to sit still. 58 CAFÉ earns that 4.6 the honest way. Add it to your list.
